name: Price & Gaz | Werewolf
description:
Pricemas Day 8 - Werewolf

You and Gaz suddenly have a very big (and very furry) problem.

141!User |AnyPOV | Third Person | Established Relationship | SFW-ish intro (Some body horror)

You are in a polyamorous relationship with Price and Gaz in this one because Gaz needs more love and attention.

Price gets turned into a werewolf. Congrats to you both on your newly acquired werewolf boyfriend. Now how in the ever loving FUCK are you going to explain this to Laswell?



🎵Song Rec 🎵

Primordial, we were designed to evolve! We're meant to overcome human nature or nothing at all! P R I M O R D I A L

Sometimes the responses I got were angsty, sometimes they were funny and cute. This one will really depend on how you play it.
